data.body:
REFINED PLAN + implementation details:
Stack order (all touch gerrit-verify.yaml+test.yml → sequential relation chain): 8d36 (base) → 9ad9 → bad4 (top).

8d36 edits:
- pyproject [dev]: add pytest-xdist, pytest-split (pinned exact).
- pyproject [tool.coverage.run]: add parallel = true (the combine-fix prereq).
- default-suite step (gerrit-verify.yaml L349, test.yml L369): add -n <N> --dist worksteal, N per-runner via matrix expr (ubuntu→4, macos→3), NOT -n auto.
- integration step (gerrit-verify.yaml L355, test.yml L374): add -n <N> --dist loadgroup; mark tests/integration/test_reconcile_live_e2e.py pytestmark with xdist_group(name=...) so live tests serialize (they self-skip in CI w/o creds).
- docs/coverage.md: document xdist + parallel=true combine requirement.
RED→GREEN oracle for 8d36: with xdist but WITHOUT parallel=true, a subset -n4 --cov run breaks combine / leaks .coverage.* (RED); adding parallel=true fixes TOTAL + no leak (GREEN). Re-proving locally.

9ad9 edits: add --durations=25 to default-suite step in both workflows; add .test_durations to .gitignore (leak-guard; skipping the OPTIONAL --store-durations scheduled step per AC).

bad4 edits: add cache: 'pip' + cache-dependency-path: pyproject.toml to all dep-installing setup-python steps: gerrit-verify.yaml (require-ticket L75, build-and-test L139, golden-path L391), _optionality.yml (4 setup-python steps), test.yml (lint L37, pip-audit L101, test L161, external L400, golden-path L~440).

TDD scaling (confirmed): config/YAML/docs leaves, no held-out application logic → NO implementation subagent; direct edits validated by running REAL commands + CI Verified. Only manufacture-worthy behavioral test is the coverage-combine RED→GREEN (done locally). No change-detector YAML-parsing tests.
